calculateBondingCurveSupply(uint16,bool).details: Validates:      1. airdropBips_ <= reserveSupplyParams.maxAirdropBips      2. airdropBips + (needAcf ? acfReservedBips : 0) <= maxTotalReservedBips      All values are in bips (1 bip = 0.01%, e.g., 234 = 2.34%)

params.needAcf_: Whether ACF operations are needed (adds acfReservedBips reserve)

returns._0: bondingCurveSupply The supply available for bonding curve (in base units, not wei)
gradThreshold The graduation threshold (agent token amount in wei)

calculateLaunchFee(bool,bool).details: Fee structure:      - Immediate launch, no ACF: 0      - Immediate launch, with ACF: acfFee      - Scheduled launch, no ACF: normalLaunchFee      - Scheduled launch, with ACF: normalLaunchFee + acfFee

params.isScheduledLaunch_: Whether this is a scheduled launch

returns._0: totalFee The total fee to charge
Duration in seconds (0 for NONE, 60 for 60S, 5880 for 98M)
fakeInitialVirtualLiq The fake initial VIRTUAL liquidity in wei

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.params_: The bonding curve parameters (K, assetRate, targetRealVirtual)
The reserve supply parameters (all in bips, 1 bip = 0.01%, e.g., 500 = 5.00%)
The new scheduled launch parameters (startTimeDelay, fee)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

calculateBondingCurveSupply(uint16,bool).notice: Calculate bonding curve supply with validation

calculateGradThreshold(uint256).notice: Calculate graduation threshold for a token

calculateLaunchFee(bool,bool).notice: Calculate total launch fee based on launch type and ACF requirement

getAntiSniperDuration(uint8).notice: Get anti-sniper tax duration in seconds for a given type

getDeployParams().notice: Get deploy params as memory struct (for contract calls)

getFakeInitialVirtualLiq().notice: Get the fixed fake initial virtual liquidity

getScheduledLaunchParams().notice: Get scheduled launch params as memory struct (for contract calls)

isPrivilegedLauncher(address).notice: Backend allowlist (BondingV5): preLaunch for X_LAUNCH & ACP_SKILL; launch() for X_LAUNCH, ACP_SKILL, or isProject60days (taxRecipient must be set by backend before launch)

isValidAntiSniperType(uint8).notice: Check if anti-sniper tax type is valid

setPrivilegedLauncher(address,bool).notice: Authorize or revoke privileged backend wallets for:         - preLaunch when launch mode is X_LAUNCH or ACP_SKILL (BondingV5)         - launch() when token is X_LAUNCH, ACP_SKILL, or Project60days (BondingV5), so taxRecipient           can be updated by the backend before trading starts
